# Warranty Claim Window

Warranty claims must currently be filed within 90 days of delivery (effective 2026-04-20). Two earlier Source versions (2024-03, 2025-08) described shorter windows now superseded; only the current version is cited here.

[Source: warranty_claims_v3.md#claim-window]
